summary: How digital-asset products change when trust structures, succession, governance, and recovery are in scope.

label: Assess product fit and disclosure burden
summary: Ensure the selected product is appropriate for the target segment and that core cautions are evidenced.

label: Evidence segregation and delegated-custody boundaries
summary: Show who controls assets, where they sit, and how client and house assets are separated.

label: Apply transfer screening and Travel Rule checks
summary: Ensure outbound and inbound transfer workflows include screening and data-sharing controls when required.

label: Verify investor eligibility and class restrictions
summary: Prevent subscriptions and transfers that violate class, jurisdiction, or target-investor limits.

label: Govern NAV, pricing, and stale-data handling
summary: Ensure mint, burn, fee, and reporting flows depend on an explicit pricing and stale-data policy.

label: Reconcile on-chain and off-chain records
summary: Maintain a defined source-of-truth policy and mismatch escalation for tokenized workflows.

label: Govern coupons, record dates, and servicing exceptions
summary: Ensure lifecycle events such as coupons, calls, or maturity payments are aligned to records and investor communications.

label: Apply sanctions and counterparty screening
summary: Run and evidence sanctions, AML, and counterparty screens before sensitive transfers and settlements.

label: Map the legal wrapper and perimeter before launch
summary: Force explicit classification and launch-review checkpoints where product perimeter is uncertain.

label: Model prefunding, liquidity, and intraday limits
summary: Show how the chosen settlement asset and rail affect funding, limits, and failure handling.

label: Assess issuer, vendor, and venue concentration
summary: Make dependency concentration visible when a product depends heavily on one provider or rail.

label: Prepare incident communication and recovery playbooks
summary: Ensure key compromise, outage, sanctions alerts, and data mismatches have explicit response paths.

label: Evidence authority, succession, and recovery for complex holdings
summary: Support family-office and UHNW workflows with explicit governance and continuity controls.

label: Govern delegated operators and sub-custodians
summary: Define oversight, reporting, and fallback expectations for external operators.

summary: Global prudential anchor for exposure, capital, and risk framing.

summary: Cross-cutting cyber and resilience anchor for the control library.

summary: Global AML and Travel Rule anchor for transfer and screening controls.

label: Delivery versus Payment (DvP)
summary: A settlement pattern that exchanges asset and cash together.

label: Payment versus Payment (PvP)
summary: A settlement pattern exchanging one payment leg for another.

label: Finality
summary: The point at which a transfer is treated as irreversible for operational purposes.

label: Travel Rule
summary: Information-sharing expectations for certain virtual asset transfers.

label: Stablecoin
summary: A token designed to reference a fiat currency or another value source.

label: Tokenized Deposit
summary: A tokenized representation of a bank deposit or commercial-bank-money claim.

label: E-money Token (EMT)
summary: A MiCA-defined token referencing a single official currency.

label: Crypto-Asset Service Provider (CASP)
summary: A regulated role under MiCA for certain crypto-asset services.

label: Fiat-Referenced Token (FRT)
summary: A token referencing one or more fiat currencies.

label: Wallet Whitelisting
summary: A process that limits transfers to approved wallets or identities.

label: Net Asset Value (NAV)
summary: A per-unit valuation measure used by funds.

label: Segregation
summary: Operational and legal separation of client assets from firm assets.

label: Reconciliation
summary: The process of matching records across systems.

label: DORA
summary: EU Digital Operational Resilience Act.

label: Prudential Treatment
summary: How exposures are treated for capital and risk purposes.

label: Cold Storage
summary: A custody model that keeps signing material offline.
